What you will see in this 160-second breakdown:
→ claude agents --json — every live session as parseable JSON for jq + dashboards
→ /plugin Discover panes now show commands, agents, skills, hooks, MCP and LSP servers BEFORE install
→ 18 background-session fixes — /resume bg by name, --add-dir preserved on detach, Mac sleep crashes gone
→ Status line JSON input now ships repo name + branch + PR number + diff state
→ Where the fixes actually landed: 18 background sessions, 5 plugin marketplace, 4 MCP servers
→ Opus 1M token context window now selectable on AWS Bedrock and Google Vertex — no API rewrite

Claude Code v2.1.145 release notes: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/releases/tag/v2.1.145
Claude Code v2.1.144 release notes: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/releases/tag/v2.1.144
Full CHANGELOG: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md

JSON output, plugin X-ray, or one million tokens on Bedrock — which patch ships you faster? Drop your pick in the comments.
